title: verbascum symes
intro: Verbascum symes, also known as Yellow Mullein, is a biennial or perennial flowering plant that belongs to the figwort family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum symes include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Verbascum symes include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
